headline: Booking Holdings Inc. to Present at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference
summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) today announced that Chief Financial Officer Ewout Steenbergen will participate in a fireside chat at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference, held in London, on May 5th beginning at 10:45 am CET. A live audio cast of the presentation will be available to the public at https://ir.bookingholdings.com/events, and a replay will be available approximately 24 hours later.
